prompt: Plan the implementation for a new CLI dashboard screen that shows real-time test results.
expected_output: Plan document saved to .prism/shared/plans/ with all required sections
expectations: Success criteria are split into Automated Verification and Manual Verification sections
Each phase includes specific file paths and verification commands
A 'What We Are NOT Doing' scope section is included
Risks and mitigations section is present
TodoWrite is used to track phases
